headline: Cramer Gives Vistra His Blessing, Backs Stryker, Steers Clear Of AI-Exposed FICO
summary: Jim Cramer endorsed Vistra, expressed caution on Fair Isaac over AI risks: "I'm not going to get in the crosshairs anymore."
